audio.style: Warm, confident product-launch bed — felt piano + soft analog synth pad, gentle and hopeful, instrumental. Claude-launch calm, never busy.
audio.instrumentation: Felt/soft piano, warm analog pad, light sub-bass, sparse mallet accents, tasteful airy texture. No drums until the payoff, then a soft kick + brushed pulse only.
audio.hook: A simple, memorable 4-note rising piano motif that returns at the payoff and resolves on the end card.

beats.label: Cold open
beats.sound: One held felt-piano chord, air, space. The promise stated.

beats.label: Admin AI
beats.sound: Motif enters on piano, pad swells softly under it.

beats.label: PDF roster
beats.sound: Add a light mallet accent as rows register.

beats.label: WhatsApp core
beats.sound: Gentle rise; warmth grows as the customer is helped end-to-end.

beats.label: Dashboard payoff
beats.sound: The motif returns full, a soft kick + brushed pulse arrive, hopeful lift.

beats.label: End card
beats.sound: Resolve the motif on a warm major chord; let it ring out.

roleText.build: add one voice at a time, keep it sparse and unhurried
roleText.riser: swell warmth and register, no percussion yet
roleText.sustain: hold the warmth, let the picture breathe

audio.dynamics: A quiet bed with generous headroom — never near clipping. The payoff is a gentle lift, not a drop.
audio.exclude: vocals, lyrics, hard EDM drops, aggressive drums, lo-fi hiss, fade-out ending
audio.sfxNotes: Soft UI tap on each chat send; a subtle switch-click when Auto-balas flips off; a light chime when the receipt PDF arrives. All low, on-frame.
